In the Latin square below, each symbol (A–G) appears **exactly once in every row and every column**. Blank cells are `·`, and the target cell in row 3 is marked **?**. In that row, which column must contain the symbol **E**?

|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **1** | · | B | · | F | · | A | E |
| **2** | C | A | E | D | B | G | · |
| **3** | G | **?** | A | · | · | · | · |
| **4** | · | G | F | E | · | B | D |
| **5** | F | · | · | G | · | E | · |
| **6** | E | C | G | · | F | D | · |
| **7** | B | F | D | · | E | C | G |
